fonts.heading: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif
fonts.body: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

hero.heading: Coffee that wakes up your soul
hero.subheading: Ethically sourced beans, roasted fresh every morning and delivered to your door.

items.title: Ethically Sourced
items.text: Direct-trade beans from farmers we know by name.

items.title: Roasted Daily
items.text: Every bag is roasted within 24 hours of shipping.

items.title: Free Shipping
items.text: On all orders over $35, anywhere in the country.

sections.heading: Our story
sections.text: Acme Coffee Roasters started in a tiny garage in 2012. Today we roast for thousands of households, but we still treat every batch like our first.

pages.title: About
pages.content: We are a small team obsessed with great coffee. Learn more about our roasting philosophy and the farmers we partner with.

pages.title: Shop
pages.content: Browse our current selection of single-origin and blended coffees.

pages.title: Contact
pages.content: Have a question? Reach out and we'll get back to you within one business day.

posts.title: Welcome to our new website
posts.content: We just launched our brand new site. Take a look around and let us know what you think!

posts.title: How we pick our beans
posts.content: A behind-the-scenes look at how we travel the world to find the perfect coffee beans.
